title: croton heterolepis
intro: Croton heterolepis, also known as African bushman's tea or croton, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of croton heterolepis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The plant's herbal preparations often involve extracting its roots to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are then used to harness its medicinal properties.
